mapper.select:
select venueType, venueTypeText, currencyCode, count(DISTINCT(userId)) as issueNums, sum(issueAmount) as issueAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN userId END) AS receiveNums, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN rebateAmount END) AS rebateAmount from (
) as t group by venueType,venueTypeText,currencyCode ORDER BY venueType ASC, currencyCode ASC

select count(DISTINCT(userId)) as issueNums, sum(issueAmount) as issueAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN userId END) AS receiveNums, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN rebateAmount END) AS rebateAmount from (
) as t
